collections.name: users
collections.description: Stores user profile information and credentials.

fields.uid: String - The unique Firebase Authentication ID.
fields.isAdmin: Boolean - Whether the user has administrative privileges.
fields.isShadow: Boolean - Whether the user is a shadow player (created by admin, not a real registered user).
fields.photoUrl: String - URL to the user's profile picture in Firebase Storage.
fields.updatedAt: Timestamp - Date of last profile update.

collections.population: Populated during registration (src/app/auth/signin/page.tsx) or when an admin creates a shadow player (src/app/admin/users/page.tsx). Updated via the profile settings page.

collections.name: events
collections.description: Stores details about specific Padel events.

fields.eventId: String - Custom ID (e.g., EVENT022) generated from counters.
fields.adminId: String - UID of the admin who created the event.
fields.dateTime: Timestamp - Date and time when the event starts.
fields.duration: Number - Duration of the event in minutes.
fields.locationName: String - The name of the venue or club.
fields.clubId: String (Optional) - Reference to a document in the 'clubs' collection.
fields.coordinates: Object {lat: Number, lng: Number} - Geographic location.
fields.pricePerPlayer: Number - Cost to participate per person.
fields.slotsAvailable: Number - Maximum capacity for the event.
fields.waitlistCount: Number - Number of teams/players currently on the waitlist.
fields.isPublic: Boolean - Whether the event is visible to all users.
fields.isTeamRegistration: Boolean - If true, players register as pairs.
fields.logoUrl: String - URL to the event image/logo.
fields.cancellationMessage: String (Optional) - Reason for cancellation if status is 'Cancelled'.
fields.createdAt: Timestamp - When the event was created.

collections.population: Created by admins in src/app/events/create/page.tsx. The eventId is incremented using the 'counters' collection. registrationsCount and waitlistCount are dynamically updated by participation hooks (useTeamInvite, useTeamAccept, etc.).

collections.name: registrations
collections.description: Links users to events, tracking their participation status.

fields.registrationId: String - Unique ID for the registration record.
fields.eventId: String - The ID of the event the user is registered for.
fields.playerId: String - UID of the primary participant.
fields.player2Id: String (Optional) - UID of the teammate (if applicable).
fields.fullNameP1: String - Name of the primary player (denormalized for display).
fields.teamId: String (Optional) - Link to a document in the 'teams' collection.
fields.isPrimary: Boolean - If true, this user is the one who initiated the registration.
fields.lookingForPartner: Boolean - If true, the user is registered but needs a teammate.
fields.waitlistPosition: Number - The user's order in the waitlist.
fields.registeredAt: Timestamp - When the user first attempted to register.
fields.confirmedAt: Timestamp - When the registration was finalized (e.g., after partner acceptance or payment).
fields.invite: String - The logic path used for registration ('FRESH', 'MERGE_P1', etc.).
fields._debugSource: String - Internal tracking of which hook or component created the record.

collections.population: Managed primarily via custom hooks: useTeamInvite (sending invites), useTeamAccept (confirming), useTeamDissolve (deleting), and useEventWithdraw. It also handles waitlist promotion logic.

collections.name: teams
collections.description: Pairs two players for a specific event.

fields.teamId: String - Unique ID of the team.
fields.eventId: String - The ID of the event.
fields.player1Id: String - UID of the first player (usually the initiator).
fields.player1Confirmed: Boolean - Whether player 1 has confirmed participation.
fields.player2Confirmed: Boolean - Whether player 2 has confirmed participation.
fields.invite: String - The invite type used to form the team.
fields.createdAt: Timestamp - When the team was formed.
fields._debugSource: String - Internal tracking of creation source.

collections.population: Created in src/hooks/useTeamInvite.ts when a player invites another. The status remains 'PENDING' until player 2 accepts via src/hooks/useTeamAccept.ts.

fields.name: String - Name of the club.
fields.location: Object {address: String, coordinates: {lat: Number, lng: Number}} - Venue address and GPS data.
fields.pictureUrl: String - URL to the club's image.
fields.notes: String - Additional information about the club.
fields.createdAt: Timestamp - When the club was added.

collections.name: notifications

fields.notificationId: String - Unique ID for the notification.
fields.title: String - Subject line of the notification.
fields.read: Boolean - Whether the user has seen the notification.
fields.fromUserId: String (Optional) - UID of the user who triggered the notification.
fields.eventName: String (Optional) - Name of the related event (for display).
fields.eventDate: Timestamp (Optional) - Date of the related event.
fields.createdAt: Timestamp - When the notification was sent.

collections.population: Triggered by system events in hooks (useTeamInvite, useTeamAccept, useEventWithdraw) or during registration.

collections.name: counters
collections.description: Maintains auto-incrementing counters for unique IDs.

fields.lastIndex: Number - The last used index for a specific entity (currently used for 'events').

collections.population: Managed via transactions in src/app/events/create/page.tsx during the event creation process.
